task_completion.description: Verify that duplicate entries have been merged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero main library view, there should be no duplicate titles. Specifically, 'Neuroscience-Inspired Artificial Intelligence', 'A deep learning framework for neuroscience', and 'Toward an Integration of Deep Learning and Neuroscience' should only appear once each.

task_completion.description: Verify that papers published before 2000 were moved to the Trash.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Zotero 'Trash' folder should contain the 4 pre-2000 papers (Hodgkin 1952, Hubel 1962, Hopfield 1982, Rumelhart 1986). Alternatively, the main library should no longer list any papers with a year before 2000.

task_completion.description: Verify that incomplete papers are tagged and moved to 'Needs Manual Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A collection named 'Needs Manual Review' exists in the left pane. It should contain exactly 4 papers (Yamins 2014, Banino 2018, Kell 2018, Saxe 2021). The tag 'incomplete-record' should be visible in the bottom-left tag selector or assigned to these items.

task_completion.description: Verify that abbreviated venue names were standardized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero item pane (right side) or the center list's 'Publication' column, the venues for Barak 2017 and Kriegeskorte 2015 should show the full names ('Current Opinion in Neurobiology' and 'Annual Review of Vision Science') instead of their abbreviations.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Included Studies' collection and the 'Screening Summary' note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A collection named 'Included Studies' exists in the left pane. It should contain exactly 14 paper items and 1 standalone note titled 'Screening Summary'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the collection was exported as BibTeX to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'included_studies.bib' is visible on the Desktop background, or a file manager/terminal window shows this file exists at /home/ga/Desktop/included_studies.bib.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show Zotero open with active interactions (e.g., selecting items, right-clicking, using the export dialog, editing metadata in the right pane) rather than terminal commands modifying the sqlite database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the BibTeX file was exported via Zotero.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero 'Export Collection' dialog being used, rather than the agent just creating a text file named 'included_studies.bib' using terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo'.

integrity.description: Verify the standalone note was created using Zotero's note feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Screening Summary' should appear with a note icon (a yellow square with lines) in the Zotero center pane, not as a regular empty item renamed to look like a note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Initial library has 25 items. 3 duplicate pairs exist: Hassabis 2017, Richards 2019, Marblestone 2016. 4 pre-2000 papers: Hodgkin 1952, Hubel 1962, Hopfield 1982, Rumelhart 1986. 4 incomplete papers (abstract 'Abstract not available'): Yamins 2014, Banino 2018, Kell 2018, Saxe 2021. Venue fixes needed for Barak 2017 ('Curr. Opin. Neurobiol.' -> 'Current Opinion in Neurobiology') and Kriegeskorte 2015 ('Annu. Rev. Vis. Sci.' -> 'Annual Review of Vision Science'). Final 'Included Studies' collection must have exactly 14 papers and 1 standalone note titled 'Screening Summary'. Export path is /home/ga/Desktop/included_studies.bib.
